Step Title: Repo scaffold: express app, project layout, /healthz with real metrics (uptime, DB, engine queue depth)
Acceptance: npm start serves /healthz with real metrics; all files <300 lines; response shape {ok:true|false}
Notes/Blockers: Standalone-deployable; no platform DB dependency

Step Title: SQLite schema + migration runner: runs, run_steps, gates, gate_approvals, servers, log_chunks tables
Acceptance: Migrations apply idempotently on boot; all queries parameterized ($1/?); schema covers parallel runs keyed by run_id
Notes/Blockers: Single-writer SQLite file on PVC

Step Title: Auth layer: operator login + API key, requireAuth on ALL data routes, capability checks (console:runs:write) on ALL mutations
Acceptance: Unauthenticated request to any /api route returns 401; mutation without capability returns 403; login + health allowlisted only

Step Title: Config/secrets layer: env + k8s Secret only, startup config validation, log redaction of credentials
Acceptance: Zero secrets in code or SQLite or logs; redaction test proves iDRAC/SP creds never appear in structured logs; missing config fails fast at boot
Notes/Blockers: Hard constraint: secrets NEVER in code/logs

Step Title: Pipeline engine core: run state machine (phase>stage), child-process executor wrapping factory bash stages 00-60, structured JSONL logs, exit-code handling, halt-at-any-phase
Acceptance: Engine executes a stub stage as child process, captures stdout/stderr to log_chunks, transitions state on exit code, and honors an operator halt mid-run
Notes/Blockers: Wraps github.com/gusitllc/azure-local-2node-factory

Step Title: SSE live log streaming: GET /api/runs/:id/logs with resume-from-offset, per-run channel
Acceptance: Browser EventSource receives live stage output <1s latency; reconnect resumes from last event id without loss

Step Title: Intervention gate engine: per-run configurable gates, paused state, approve/reject API with audit trail (who, when, note)
Acceptance: Run configured with gate-before-phase-N pauses there, resumes only on authorized approval, records approver in gate_approvals; reject aborts cleanly
Notes/Blockers: Owner requirement: gates configurable per run

Step Title: Parallel run scheduler: N independent pipeline runs, per-run isolated workdir + media-server port allocation, no shared mutable state
Acceptance: Two concurrent runs execute stages simultaneously without workdir/port/log cross-talk; automated concurrency test passes
Notes/Blockers: Owner requirement: multiple clusters at the same time

Step Title: Admin UI shell: azurestack.nyc dark-gold aesthetic, vanilla JS + fetch, esc() on all dynamic DOM, runs list + new-run wizard
Acceptance: Wizard creates a run with gate config; runs list shows live phase/status; zero framework deps; XSS probe on server names renders escaped
Notes/Blockers: NO React/Vue/CDN

Step Title: Multi-iDRAC intake: operator enters many iDRAC IPs + credentials; creds held in k8s Secret/env reference only, never persisted plaintext
Acceptance: Paste of N iDRAC IPs creates N server rows; creds absent from DB dump and logs; per-server reachability precheck shown
Notes/Blockers: L2 reach to 192.168.x iDRACs from luca-capacity verified first

Step Title: Redfish inventory via lib/redfish.sh wrapper: model, serial, health, BIOS/iDRAC versions per server; results table in UI
Acceptance: Inventory of a real server populates model/serial/health in servers table and UI within 60s; failures show verbatim Redfish error

Step Title: Firmware baseline compare: current component versions vs baseline catalog; diff report per server
Acceptance: Report lists each component as ok/behind/unknown against configured baseline; baseline is config-driven not hardcoded
Notes/Blockers: Lesson: Broadcom NIC firmware gap presents as no-network

Step Title: Firmware update plan + apply via Redfish SimpleUpdate: ordered plan, job polling, reboot orchestration, per-server progress
Acceptance: Operator approves plan; SimpleUpdate jobs tracked to completion; post-update re-inventory confirms versions; partial failure halts that server only
Notes/Blockers: OOB path proven on fl fleet (iDRAC Update Agent lineage)

Step Title: Phase-1 completion gate: verbatim error surfacing, per-server halt/skip controls, intervention gate before Phase 2
Acceptance: Any Redfish/firmware error shown verbatim in UI; operator can exclude a server; run pauses at gate until approval

Step Title: Combined ISO build integration: gen-autounattend + combined-ISO builder as engine stages; wim verified via pycdlib extraction (never trust filenames); artifact checksums recorded per run
Acceptance: Built ISO passes wim-presence + checksum verification before any vmedia attach; verification failure blocks the stage with clear error
Notes/Blockers: No ISO mounting in container; pycdlib only

Step Title: Range-capable HTTP media server for virtual media: per-run port, reachable by iDRACs, serves ISO with HTTP Range support
Acceptance: iDRAC successfully mounts ISO from console pod URL; Range requests verified; two parallel runs serve different ISOs on different ports
Notes/Blockers: Needs Service/hostNetwork decision for iDRAC-reachable IP

Step Title: Stages 18/20: Redfish vmedia attach + one-time boot to ISO, self-wiping WinPE imaging kickoff per node
Acceptance: Node boots the combined ISO via one-time boot and begins imaging; stage status transitions recorded per node
Notes/Blockers: Existing proven stages wrapped as-is

Step Title: Imaging progress monitoring: iDRAC screenshot capture + boot-phase heuristics rendered in run timeline
Acceptance: UI shows periodic console screenshots and inferred imaging phase per node; stalled-node detection raises operator alert

Step Title: Stages 30/32/35 via WinRM: driver install, time/NTP, NIC IPs + Port1..4 names, server rename per node plan
Acceptance: All nodes reach configured mgmt IPs with correct NIC names/hostnames and synced time; WinRM failures surfaced verbatim with retry
Notes/Blockers: Requires WinRM reach from pod to node mgmt IPs

Step Title: Node-build UI panel: per-node stage grid, retry-single-node action, intervention gate before Phase 3
Acceptance: Grid shows every node x stage state live; retry re-runs one node without disturbing others; gate pause verified

Step Title: Arc onboarding: onboard-node.ps1 module chain per node + install/verify the 4 AzureEdge extensions
Acceptance: All nodes show Connected in Azure Arc with 4 extensions Succeeded; per-node extension status in UI; ext failures verbatim

Step Title: Azure prep: service principal creation/reuse + resource provider registration, idempotent re-run safe
Acceptance: Re-running the stage on an already-prepped subscription is a no-op success; SP secrets flow via KV/env only; all RPs Registered
Notes/Blockers: az CLI + SP creds in image/secret

Step Title: Resource group + region/zone setup per run: RG create, region selection from wizard, tagging
Acceptance: RG exists in selected region with run-id tag; two parallel runs create distinct RGs without collision

Step Title: Key Vault creation + the 3 deployment secrets seeded from k8s Secret inputs
Acceptance: KV exists with all 3 secrets present and correct names; secret values never logged; access policy scoped to deployment SP

Step Title: Witness storage account + assign-deploy-permissions (proven script) wired as engine stage
Acceptance: Witness storage created; permission assignment stage exits green and post-check confirms all role assignments present

Step Title: ACR prep + gen-arm-parameters.py integration: ARM parameter artifact generated, validated, stored per run
Acceptance: Parameter file generated from run inputs matches schema; stored as run artifact and downloadable; intervention gate before Phase 4

Step Title: edge validate execution as engine stage with parsed pass/fail results per check in UI
Acceptance: Validation checks render as itemized pass/fail with raw output expandable; failed run can be halted or healed without restart

Step Title: deploymentSettings Validate / ARM template Validate action with long-poll status tracking
Acceptance: Validate call submitted and polled to terminal state; result persisted on run; timeout handled without false failure

Step Title: Heal paths as one-click gated remediations (ext-sync etc.) with automatic re-validate loop
Acceptance: Known heal action runs from UI behind capability check and re-triggers validation; heal history logged on the run
Notes/Blockers: Heal catalog config-driven for new MSFT-side issues

Step Title: Verbatim RP error surfacing + known-issue annotation layer (e.g. Unsupported OS Version inventory gate) + halt-run-at-any-phase control
Acceptance: RP error JSON shown untruncated verbatim; matching known-issue shows explanation banner without masking the raw error; halt works in every phase
Notes/Blockers: Open MSFT gate reads processorType/osProfile from edge inventory

Step Title: Cluster Deploy trigger (deploymentSettings Deploy, ~2.5-3h ECE) with restart-safe long-run resume
Acceptance: Deploy submits and survives console pod restart (run state + polling resume from DB); final gate before submit enforced

Step Title: track-deployment integration: live ECE action-plan step tracking streamed to UI via SSE
Acceptance: UI shows current ECE step name/progress/elapsed matching track-deployment output within one poll interval; failures verbatim

Step Title: Post-deploy monitoring dashboard: cluster health, node status, Arc/extension state, recent alerts per deployed cluster
Acceptance: Dashboard reflects real cluster state on refresh; multiple deployed clusters listed; no hardcoded cluster ids

Step Title: Recovery hooks: recover/recover.sh + rebuild-cluster.sh one-shot exposed as capability-gated console actions
Acceptance: Recovery action requires explicit gate approval; execution streams logs like any stage; audit trail records operator

Step Title: Packaging: single Dockerfile (node 22, az CLI, wimlib, python+pycdlib, factory engine vendored) + k8s manifests for luca-capacity (Deployment, Service, Ingress, Secret, PVC)
Acceptance: Image builds clean; pod runs on luca-capacity with iDRAC L2 reach, WinRM reach, and media-server reachability verified from a real iDRAC
Notes/Blockers: kubeconfig E:/tmp/luca-capacity.kubeconfig; cert-manager+ingress live

Step Title: E2E test use case: full simulated run (mocked Redfish/az/WinRM) end-to-end P1-P5 + 2-run concurrency test + gate/halt tests in CI
Acceptance: Simulated pipeline completes all phases green in CI; concurrency and gate/halt/resume tests pass; pre-deploy-check clean
Notes/Blockers: Dev-testing mandate applies

Step Title: Release closure: change-management entry, release-tracker register, image build, deploy to luca-capacity in deploy window, record-deploy, verify live on azurestack.nyc admin path, tracker updated
Acceptance: Console live behind auth with flags default-off except AZLC_CONSOLE_ENABLED; release registered + recorded; this tracker reflects released state
Notes/Blockers: Formation-suite closure requirement (>40h mandate)
